category_sources: Official GitHub README describes control and observation of media playback.
source_facts.description says it controls and observes media playback from the command line.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ungive/media-control, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies command-line media playback control.
